name: Chitty-Chitty Bang-Bang Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in a saucepan and stir over low heat.
2. Cook to soft ball stage when dropped in cold water.
3. Beat by hand until mixture loses its gloss. Chopped nuts can be added.
4. Pour into a greased 8 x 8-inch pan and cut into pieces.
5. Cool before serving.
Good fudge!
